name: forensic-artifacts
title: forensic-artifacts
summary: knowledge base of forensic artifacts (data files)
description:
knowledge base of forensic artifacts (data files)
A free, community-sourced, machine-readable knowledge base of forensic
artifacts that the world can use both as an information source and within
other tools.
.
This package installs the data files alone, without the Python toolkit.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use forensic-artifacts because knowledge base of forensic artifacts (data files).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use forensic-artifacts as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair forensic-artifacts with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `forensic-artifacts --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
